mapper.insert: INSERT INTO query_suggestion ( database_id, query_hash, has_tuning_suggestion, suggestion_level, suggestion_type, suggestion_title, suggestion_description, suggestion_sql, expected_improvement_percent, queries_per_transaction, transaction_id, created_at, ai_model, token_used, is_from_cache ) VALUES ( #{databaseId}, #{queryHash}, #{hasTuningSuggestion}, #{suggestionLevel}, #{suggestionType}, #{suggestionTitle}, #{suggestionDescription}, #{suggestionSql}, #{expectedImprovementPercent}, #{queriesPerTransaction}, #{transactionId}, #{createdAt}, #{aiModel}, #{tokenUsed}, #{isFromCache} )

INSERT INTO query_suggestion ( database_id, query_hash, has_tuning_suggestion, suggestion_level, suggestion_type, suggestion_title, suggestion_description, suggestion_sql, expected_improvement_percent, queries_per_transaction, transaction_id, created_at, ai_model, token_used, is_from_cache ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.queryHash}, #{item.hasTuningSuggestion}, #{item.suggestionLevel}, #{item.suggestionType}, #{item.suggestionTitle}, #{item.suggestionDescription}, #{item.suggestionSql}, #{item.expectedImprovementPercent}, #{item.queriesPerTransaction}, #{item.transactionId}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.aiModel}, #{item.tokenUsed}, #{item.isFromCache} )
mapper.select: SELECT suggestion_id, database_id, query_hash, has_tuning_suggestion, suggestion_level, suggestion_type, suggestion_title, suggestion_description, suggestion_sql, expected_improvement_percent, queries_per_transaction, transaction_id, created_at, ai_model, token_used, is_from_cache FROM query_suggestion WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND query_hash = #{queryHash} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT suggestion_id, database_id, query_hash, has_tuning_suggestion, suggestion_level, suggestion_type, suggestion_title, suggestion_description, suggestion_sql, expected_improvement_percent, queries_per_transaction, transaction_id, created_at, ai_model, token_used, is_from_cache FROM query_suggestion WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND query_hash = #{queryHash} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT suggestion_id, database_id, query_hash, has_tuning_suggestion, suggestion_level, suggestion_type, suggestion_title, suggestion_description, suggestion_sql, expected_improvement_percent, queries_per_transaction, transaction_id, created_at, ai_model, token_used, is_from_cache FROM query_suggestion WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND created_at >= #{fromDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC
